===================
===================
===================
=== bd 1990-09-04 tulsa.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and Band
4 September 1990	 
Riverpark Amphitheater	   
Tulsa, Oklahoma	   

-----------

lineage:  trade cdrs > eac > flac > upload
comments:  this is probably a completist show. a nice setlist for the general collector but a very annoying screamer or two on the right.
two friends were at this show and said it was very warm that night, but Bob wore a jacket and what looked like an official Russian army polar cap.  
thanks to the artists, tapers and sharers!
thanks to bjorner.com for the information.

-----------------------
disk 1
1. Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine)
2. I Believe In You
3. Tomorrow Is A Long Time
4. All Along The Watchtower
5. Masters Of War
6. Man Of Peace
7. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
8. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
9. Trail Of The Buffalo (trad. arr. Woody Guthrie)

disk 2
10. It Ain't Me, Babe
11. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
12. Every Grain Of Sand
13. Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
14. I Shall Be Released
15. Like A Rolling Stone

16. Blowin' In The Wind
17. Highway 61 Revisited


Concert # 227 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 17 of the 1990 Late Summer Tour Of North America. 
1990 concert # 57.
Concert # 149 with the second G. E. Smith band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), G. E. Smith (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Christopher Parker (drums).

Steve Ripley (guitar)

7-10, 16 acoustic with the band.
2, 7, 10, 12, 16 Bob Dylan harmonica.
18 G.E. Smith (electric slide guitar).
BobTalk:
Thank You! Nice to be back in my home town again! (before I Believe In You).

9 new songs (52%) compared to previous concert. 2 new songs for this tour.
Stereo audience recording, 85 minutes.
Session info updated 7 February 2001.
